data.title: Federal Reserve's May Rate Decision: 76.1% Chance of No Change
data.description: According to PANews, the CME's 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 76.1% probability that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current interest rates in May. There is a 23.9% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut. Looking ahead to June, the likelihood of rates remaining unchanged is 32.1%, while the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point cut stands at 54.1%, and a 50 basis point cut is at 13.8%.

data.title: Pakistan considers using surplus energy for Bitcoin mining after appointing CZ to Crypto Council
data.description:
Pakistan will allocate excess electricity from its national grid to Bitcoin (BTC) mining operations and artificial intelligence (AI) data centers, according to the country’s Crypto Council and finance ministry adviser Bilal Bin Saqib.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/pakistan-considers-using-surplus-energy-for-bitcoin-mining-after-appointing-cz-to-crypto-council/

data.title: World Food Program USA Accepts Bitcoin and Dogecoin Donations After Funding Cuts
data.description:
Since donations are tax deductible, the WFP noted, they enable crypto investors to offset capital gains.
source: https://decrypt.co/314124/world-food-program-usa-bitcoin-dogecoin-donations

data.title: South Korean Police Raid ‘Illegal Gambling Den Disguised as Crypto Mining Center’
data.description:
South Korean police have raided a suspected illegal gambling den whose operator claimed it was a center for crypto mining.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/south-korean-police-raid-illegal-gambling-den-disguised-as-crypto-mining-center/

data.title: Quantum Cats NFT floor price plunges 54% post-Taproot Wizards mint
data.description:
The discount-based demand for Quantum Cats ahead of the mint created a temporary price premium, which quickly vanished once the incentive expired.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349893/quantum-cats-nft-floor-price-plunges-54-post-taproot-wizards-mint?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: 21Shares files for Dogecoin ETF as Senate nears voting on SEC chair nomination
data.description:
With Paul Atkins nomination for SEC Chair moving forward 21Shares has filed an S-1 for a Dogecoin exchange-traded fund.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350341/21shares-files-for-dogecoin-etf-as-senate-nears-voting-on-sec-chair-nomination?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: XRP Primed for a Comeback as Key Technical Signal Hints at Explosive Move
data.description:
XRP’s recent recovery has sparked fresh optimism among traders, but what’s happening behind the scenes tells an even more compelling story. This isn’t just a typical bounce; the charts reveal a calculated shift in momentum. Technical indicators like the Relative Strength Index (RSI) and Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) are beginning to align, suggesting that XRP is approaching a crucial decision zone. Following the recent downturn in the market, the price is now on a bullish recovery after testing the $1
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-primed-for-big-move/

data.title: Ethereum Sees Highest Whale Flows In 6 Months, Price Hits 2-Year Low
data.description:
Ethereum price action has been declining in the last 7 days as the tariffs-related onslaught extended its grip on the market. However, some interesting developments were observed, including a massive spike in whale activity. Ethereum whale activity was up considerably at the start of this week
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/09/ethereum-sees-highest-whale-flows-in-6-months-price-hits-2-year-low/

data.title: OpenSea pushes SEC to clarify that NFT marketplaces are not exchanges or brokers under US federal securities laws
data.description:
OpenSea lawyers argued the NFT marketplace does not qualify as an exchange or broker under federal securities laws.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350346/opensea-pushes-sec-to-clarify-that-nft-marketplaces-are-not-exchanges-or-brokers-under-us-federal-securities-laws?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SEC Approves Options Trading on Ethereum ETFs From BlackRock, Grayscale and Bitwise
data.description:
Investors can now trade options on some of the Ethereum ETFs approved last year by the Securities and Exchange Commission.
source: https://decrypt.co/314235/sec-approves-options-trading-on-ethereum-etfs-from-blackrock-grayscale-and-bitwise
